import { Observable } from '../Observable'; import { MonoTypeOperatorFunction, ObservableInput } from '../types'; /** @deprecated The `subscriptionDelay` parameter will be removed in v8. */ export declare function delayWhen<T>(delayDurationSelector: (value: T, index: number) => ObservableInput<any>, subscriptionDelay: Observable<any>): MonoTypeOperatorFunction<T>; export declare function delayWhen<T>(delayDurationSelector: (value: T, index: number) => ObservableInput<any>): MonoTypeOperatorFunction<T>; //# sourceMappingURL=delayWhen.d.ts.map
